Scenarios
  • Registered: User adding Product with Accessories and adding the required accessory or warranty to the cart
  • Registered: User adding Product with Accessories and adding the required accessory and removing the parent product
  • Registered: User adding Accessory first and adding the parent item
  • Registered: User Cart Overlay with Accessories and Validation in Cart page
  • Registered: User able to add Item with Accessory to Cart from Rapid Order
  • Guest: User adding Product with Accessories and adding the required accessory or warranty to the cart
  • Guest: User adding Accessory first and adding the parent item
  • Guest: User adding Product with Accessories and adding the required accessory and removing the parent product
  • Guest: User Cart Overlay with Accessories and Validation in Cart page
  • Guest: User able to add Item with Accessory to Cart from Rapid Order
  • adding Child part as Registered user and parent part as guest user and again logging in
  • adding Restricted part as Guest user and sign in and verify cart page
  • adding part number with accessory and checking other functionalities
  • adding part number with accessory, add accessory and checking other functionalities
  • adding part number with acessory whose child part also has accessory

Scenarios
  • @Regression @EU1 @PT @IT @IE @FR @FI @ES @DK @DE @CH @BE @AT @SE @PT @NO @NL @US: Verify Add to Cart button is showing for Guest User

  • @Regression @US: Validate if add to cart is enabled for guest users for products which are whitelisted

  • @Regression @US: Validate if productData is being populated correctly when any item is added to cart from LW SRP page's quickview US region

  • @Regression: Verify the Restricted Products Add to cart Functionality for a Guest User

  • @Regression: Verify by clicking on the check availability link as a Guest User

Scenarios
  • @Smoke @US1 @CA @EU1 @SE @PT @NO @NL @IT @IE @FR @FI @ES @DK @DE @CH @BE @AT: Verify user redirects to SDS page
  • @Regression @US1: Verify blank search shows Please enter at least one search term and retry your search.
  • @Regression @US1: Verify sds logo and Contact our Customer Service Team link in sds homepage.
  • @Regression @US1: verify the error message Were sorry, but the search term that you entered is not valid. Please enter additional characters and retry your search.
  • @Regression @US1: verify error message Were sorry, there were no matches for 'A' found on our site. Please enter more than 1 character and retry your search.
  • @Regression @US1: verify error message Were sorry. There are no SDS matches for your search term 'Aslkjfldksjfsk'.If you need help finding your SDS, call Customer Service at 1-800-766-7000.
  • @Regression @US1: Verify when user clicks on NEXT and PREV in sds results page is navigated to the previous and next sds results pages
  • @Smoke @US1 @CA @EU1 @SE @PT @NO @NL @IT @IE @FR @FI @ES @DK @DE @CH @BE @AT: Validate the 'Click a Catalog Number to open the SDS pdf' message displayed in sds results page below the pagination
  • @Regression @US1: Validate the total results message present in sds results page below the search box and clicking on pagination number navigates to the result page
  • @Regression @US1: Validate clicking on fisher Catalog Number redirects to msds pdf page in sds results page
  • @Regression @US1 @CA @EU1 @SE @PT @NO @NL @IT @IE @FR @FI @ES @DK @DE @CH @BE @AT: validate clicking on the image of structure in results page should pop up and display.
  • @Regression @US1 @CA @EU1 @SE @PT @NO @NL @IT @IE @FR @FI @ES @DK @DE @CH @BE @AT: Validate pagination in SDS search results page.
  • @Regression @US1 @CA @EU1 @SE @PT @NO @NL @IT @IE @FR @FI @ES @DK @DE @CH @BE @AT: Validate the page Title in sds results and pdf page.
  • @Regression @US1 @CA @EU1 @SE @PT @NO @NL @IT @IE @FR @FI @ES @DK @DE @CH @BE @AT: Validate sds results page should retain search box, search button and sds logo in results page.
  • @Regression @US1 @CA @EU1 @SE @PT @NO @NL @IT @IE @FR @FI @ES @DK @DE @CH @BE @AT: Validate Auto corrected your search term message in sds results page.
  • @Regression @US1 @CA @EU1 @SE @PT @NO @NL @IT @IE @FR @FI @ES @DK @DE @CH @BE @AT: Validate the input text field as blank while clicking on the search button in Home page and results page.
  • @Regression @US1 @CA @EU1 @SE @PT @NO @NL @IT @IE @FR @FI @ES @DK @DE @CH @BE @AT: Validate the home page is displaying correct content.
  • @Regression @EU1 @SE @PT @NO @NL @IT @IE @FR @FI @ES @DK @DE @CH @BE @AT: Verify the External Manufacturer Search card and clicking on brand it redirect to cq page.
  • @Regression @US1 @CA @EU1 @SE @PT @NO @NL @IT @IE @FR @FI @ES @DK @DE @CH @BE @AT: Validate the number of columns in sds results page.
  • @Regression @CH: Validate the number of columns in sds results page for CH_IT region.
  • @Regression @DE: Verify the External Manufacturer Search card and clicking on brand it redirect to cq page CH_DE region
  • @Regression @FR: Validate Auto corrected your search term message in sds results page CH_FR region.

  • @Smoke @US1 @CA @EU2 @DE @DK @SE @AT @PT @NO @NL @IE @IT @FR @ES @FI @BE @CH: Verify that when a user is not on the first page of results and clicks on the PREV button then the user is navigated to the previous result page.
  • @Regression @CA @US1 @EU2 @DE @DK @SE @AT @PT @NO @NL @IE @IT @FR @ES @FI @BE @CH: Verify the when on the first page the PREV button is grey and not clickable
  • @Regression @CA @US1 @EU2 @DE @DK @SE @AT @PT @NO @NL @IE @IT @FR @ES @FI @BE @CH: Verify that when on the last page of results the NEXT button is grey and not clickable.
  • @Smoke @US1 @CA @EU2 @DE @DK @SE @AT @PT @NO @NL @IE @IT @FR @ES @FI @BE @CH: Verify that when a user clicks on a pagination number that it navigates you to that result page
  • @Regression @CA @US1 @EU2 @DE @DK @SE @AT @PT @NO @NL @IE @IT @FR @ES @FI @BE @CH: Verify User land on SRP page,Click on Category link in the Category filter section
  • Verify User land on SRP page, Click on Category link under Product Family Card
  • @Regression @CA @US1 @EU2 @DE @DK @SE @AT @PT @NO @NL @IE @IT @FR @ES @FI @BE @CH: Verify user is taken to pdp page by searching a partnum which is tagged to competitor_crossref is showing yellow box message
  • @Regression @US1: Verify hovering on glyph displays learn more link in the message clicking on which should redirect the user to respective page
  • @Regression @EU2 @DE @DK @SE @AT @PT @NO @NL @IE @IT @FR @ES @FI @BE @CH: Verify hovering on glyph displays learn more link in the message clicking on which should redirect the user to respective page
  • @Regression @CA: Verify hovering on glyph displays learn more link in the message clicking on which should redirect the user to respective page
  • @Regression @EU: Verify encompass/encompass preferred for a particular brand.
  • @Regression @US1: Verify encompass/encompass preferred for a particular brand.

Prod_Promotion_EU_Regression.spec.js
test-scripts/PDP2/EU/Prod/Prod_Promotion_EU_Regression.spec.js
Scenarios
  • Verify Promo and promo code is displayed along with view Promotion available link in pdp page
  • Verify user redirects to promotion tab section when user clicks on view Promotion available link in pdp page
  • Verify user should be able to add quantity and navigate to cart when promo and promo code is avaiable in pdp page
  • Verify no promo code and no webprice is shown in pdp page
  • Verify user should be able to add item to list in pdp page
  • Verify web pricing is taken priority when promo and webpricing is available in pdp page
  • Verify user should see IBS promo message when IBS message is available and CQ message is not available
  • Verify user should see CQ message and does not see IBS promo message
  • Verify user should not see CQ message and IBS promo message and when IBS message and CQ message is not available
  • Verify user should see CQ message and IBS promo message and when IBS message and CQ message is available
  • Verify Promo and promo code is displayed along with view Promotion available link in item page
  • Verify user redirects to promotion tab section when user clicks on view Promotion available link in item page
  • Verify user should be able to add quantity and navigate to cart when promo and promo code is avaiable in item page
  • Verify no promo code and no webprice is shown in item page
  • Verify user should be able to add item to list in item page
  • Verify web pricing is taken priority when promo and webpricing is available in item page
  • Verify user should see IBS promo message when IBS message is available and CQ message is not available in item page
  • Verify user should see CQ message and does not see IBS promo message and when IBS message is not available and CQ message is available in item page
  • Verify user should not see CQ message and IBS promo message and when IBS message and CQ message is not available in item page
  • Verify user should see CQ message and IBS promo message and when IBS message and CQ message is available in item page
  • Verify when user clicks on view avaiable promotion link in pdp item page promo model should be triggered
  • Verify only CQ promo is shown in single pdp page when IBS promo is not present
  • Verify only CQ promo is shown in item page when IBS promo is not present
  • Verify when user clicks on view avaiable promotion link in pdp family page promo model should be triggered
  • Verify when user clicks on view avaiable promotion link in single pdp page promo model should be triggered

  • Verify cart icon shows count correctly once after user clicks on add to cart from promotion tab section as registered user

customer_app.spec.js
test-scripts/PDP2/US/QA/customer_app.spec.js
Scenarios
  • Verify item request form page with registered user
  • verify invalid email format in email format field
  • verify description field accepts maximum of 950 character
  • verify comment field accepts 300 characters
  • verify remove button against each item enabled only if number of item greater than 1
  • verify error message when user does not input supplier name in supplier information and clicks on submit
  • verify error message when user does not input part number ,description in item information and clicks on submit
  • verify error message when user does not input first name,last name and email in contact information and clicks on submit
  • verify first name and last name fiels accepts maximum of 50 characters
  • verify supplier name field accepts maxlength of 50
  • verify supplier contactname field accepts maxlength of 50
  • verify email field with required valid pattern
  • verify email field with required Invalid pattern
  • verify suggest price field should accept number & greater than 0 and less than 1million
  • verify item minimum size is 1
  • verify item maximum size is 10
  • verify part number field with required valid pattern
  • verify part number field with required invalid pattern
  • user completes mandatory field in item request form page
  • user validates max field limit in phone number field is 10
  • user validates error message when input less digit in phone number field
  • user validates error message when user inputs special character in phone number field
  • user validates error message when user inputs alpha numeric character in phone number field
  • user validates phone number field as non mandatory field
  • Verify You can upload maximum of two files only error message when user tries to upload more than two file
  • Verify error message Please upload only: pdf, png, jpeg, jpg, docx, xlsx, csv, txt files when user tries to upload unsupported file
  • Verify error message Please upload file less than 10MB when user upload more than 10 MB file size
  • Verify user upload two file with both file being unsupported
  • Verify user upload two supported valid file at a time
  • Verify user upload two file with one file being unsupported
  • Verify removal of Order needed by field
  • Verify Copywrite in Comment header changed to Comment / Link to product page
  • Verify Suggested Price is not a mandatory field
  • User verifies error message "You can upload atleast one file to proceed." in bulk upload when no file is uploaded
  • Verify user uploads valid max file greater than 10 MB in list individually quote section
  • Verify user uploads invalid file in list individually quote section
  • Verify user uploads valid file in list individually quote section
  • Verify error message when user uploads more than one valid file in list individually quote section
  • verify switch to list individually modal is displayed when user tries to switch to list individually after uploading file from bulk upload
  • Verify switch to bulk modal is displayed when user tries to switch to bulk after uploading file from list individually

Scenarios
  • verify user redirect to customer dashboard
  • verify user redirect to item request page when clicked on start new request
  • verify user redirects Customer dashboard landing page when user navigates back from item request page
  • verify prev button is disabled by default
  • verify the Record are displayed in customer dashboard
  • verify user navigates to request detail page to customer dashboard
  • verify data populated in Request detail page in customer dashboard page
  • verify no record found when searched request is found in customer dashboard page
  • verify user retreives exact record when searched request is found in customer dashboard page
  • @smoke: verify Sort by supplier name A-Z in customer dashboard page regression1,
  • @smoke: verify Sort by supplier name Z-A in customer dashboard page
  • @smoke: verify Sort by submitted A-Z in customer dashboard page
  • @smoke: verify Sort by submitted Z-A in customer dashboard page
  • @smoke: verify Sort by date submitted newest to oldest in customer dashboard page
  • @smoke: verify Sort by date submitted oldest to newest in customer dashboard page
  • @smoke: verify column sort in submitted by field in customer dashboard page
  • @smoke: verify column sort in supplier name field in customer dashboard page
  • @smoke: verify column sort in date submitted field in customer dashboard page
  • @smoke: verify value in select box is reset to make selection whenUser select a sorting option in select box and later try to sort any field by clicking on table sort in customer dashboard page
  • @smoke: verify records are sorted in descending order after sorting
  • @smoke: verify when all requests are displayed when user searches with REQ keyword
  • @smoke: verify no record found when user searches minimum three character search with special character without REQ keyword
  • @smoke: verify no record found when user searches minimum three character search which is not in database without REQ keyword
  • @smoke: verify user retrieves exact record matching when searched with character without REQ keyword
  • @smoke: verify when user retrieves record matching with minimum three character search without REQ keyword
  • @smoke: Verify items with completed creation to have quantity input enabled ,shipping details to be given and selling price to be visible.
  • @smoke: Verify items with in progress to have quantity input disabled ,inprocess text should be shown and selling price to be NA
  • @smoke: Verify Sourcing In Process text when the request is inprocess status and one of the items is not created for NC
  • @smoke: Verify quantity field is enabled and maximum of 4 digit allowed when the request is inprocess status or complete status.
  • @smoke: Verify The quantity to be populated with 1 and subttotal be updated and add to cart button be enabled when user checks any enabled checkbox
  • @smoke: Verify all the enabled checkboxes of the form are checked already select all checkbox should also be enabled along with this.
  • @smoke: Verify sub total is updated when user enters some value in the quantity input box and focus out.
  • @smoke: Verify sub total is updated when user enters value greater than 999 in the quantity input box and focus out.
  • @smoke: Verify user does not see any failed request in detail page.
  • @smoke: Verify the text user should see a enter a number error message should be shown next to quantity input along with exclamation mark image. and also the respective items checkbox should be disabled and allow for updating subtotal and addtocart button
  • @smoke: Verify add to cart button is not shown for submitted status in request detail page.
  • @smoke: Verify submission Details , Supplier Information and files uploaded are shown on request detail page with bulk order request number of status submitted.
  • @smoke: Verify submission Details , Supplier Information,Items and quote file if uploaded and comments are shown are shown on request detail page with bulk order request number of status submitted.
  • @smoke: Verify decimal value is not allowed in quantity field for completed form
  • @smoke: Verify decimal value is not allowed in quantity field for in process form

  • @regression: Verify when user clicks on view available promotion link in pdp page promo model should be displayed as guest user

  • @regression @smoke: Verify user is is currently editing this request message is displayed when super admin user clicks on particular request and normal user tries to opens same particular request,

  • @smoke: Verify when normal user clicks on unassigned web request it gets assigned automatically

  • @smoke: Verify normal user request is locked and super admin user or any other user cannot edit request,
  • @smoke: Verify normal user request is locked and normal user is not is able to close request ,

    Scenarios
    • Combined subuser requisition then superuser order handling
    • Multi-Tier-Requisition with place an order for requisition
    • Sub user requisition sequence (multiple variations)
    • Place requisition without VAT, with cookie
    • Place requisition with VAT and CC payment
    • Place another requisition without VAT
    • Place requisition with VAT and CC again
    • Superuser login + requisition operations
    • Login with superuser credentials and update PO number
    • Add valid and invalid promo codes
    • Deny the requisition
    • Approve the requisition
    • Search order by PO and verify requisition status
    • L - 1 login with superuser credentials and update PO number
    • L - 2 login and update PO number
    • L - 2 approve the requisition
    • L - 3 login and update PO number
    • L - 3 approve the requisition
